item.title: Bitcoin, Fiat & Rock'n'Roll – From MiCA to GENIUS: Joey Garcia on the Global Stablecoin Race & Bitcoin Banking
item.description:
What does effective regulation look like when technology evolves faster than the institutions governing it?

In this episode of Bitcoin, Fiat & Rock’n’Roll, Jonas Gross and guest host Jonathan Knoll speak with Joey Garcia, Executive Director and Chief Strategy, Policy and Regulatory Affairs Officer at Xapo Bank. A pioneer in digital asset regulation, Garcia has helped shape Gibraltar’s blockchain framework, represented Xapo in the Libra/Diem Association and advised the United Nations on global blockchain and cryptocurrency standards.

Garcia traces his journey back to 2014, when discussing Bitcoin with regulators could attract police officers rather than policy experts. His central argument remains highly relevant: the technology itself should not be the primary regulatory target. Policymakers should instead establish secure rules for the access points through which consumers and institutions interact with it.

The conversation revisits Libra and the regulatory backlash triggered by its proposed synthetic currency and Facebook-led governance structure. Garcia argues that the project did not fail because of its technology or ambition. Its concentration of power and perceived challenge to monetary sovereignty created a political obstacle it could not overcome. Yet Libra accelerated regulatory initiatives that continue to shape today’s market.

Open USD now revives parts of the consortium model under very different conditions. More than 140 participating companies could distribute the stablecoin through existing customer networks, while sharing reserve income rather than leaving it solely with the issuer. Garcia examines the strength of this incentive structure alongside possible tensions with the GENIUS Act and the CLARITY Act.

The episode also explores Xapo Bank’s distinctive position between banking and crypto. Customers can transfer USDC or USDT into a US-dollar bank account, earn interest on their deposits and receive that interest in Bitcoin—an architecture designed to combine regulated banking safeguards with crypto-native functionality.

Finally, Garcia compares the innovation-oriented US approach with more restrictive frameworks in the EU and UK, discusses the unresolved treatment of DeFi under MiCA and explains why self-custodial wallets must remain connected to the regulated financial system.

Joey Garcia LinkedIn

Xapo Bank Website

Previous BFRR Episode with Christian Catalini

Bitcoin, Fiat & Rock’n’Roll Website

Bitcoin, Fiat & Rock’n’Roll Telegram Channel

item.title: The Bitcoin Infinity Show – How Bitcoin Backed Lending Actually Works with Martin Matejka | Bitcoin Infinity Show #212
item.description:
Martin Matejka joins the Bitcoin Infinity Show to talk about using Bitcoin as collateral for loans without handing your coins to a trust me bro platform like the ones that collapsed in the last cycle. He and Knut get into how Firefish uses Bitcoin layer one tools like multisig, timelocks, and partially signed transactions to keep counterparty risk low, why borrowing in fiat is really a bet against a failing currency, and how self-custody changes what it even means to own an asset. The conversation widens into real estate as a store of value, the illusion of ownership under central planning, and why sound money and abundant energy point toward a freer future.

Connect with Martin:

item.title: Bitcoin Policy Institute – Spotlight Series Ep. 2: Rep. Nick Begich
item.description:
Rep. Nick Begich (R-AK) reached Congress by an unusual route: founding software companies and holding Bitcoin since 2013. BPI's David Zell sat down with him at PubKey to talk about how a builder's instincts shape the way he legislates, his bill to give the U.S. a strategic Bitcoin reserve, and the policy questions AI is raising faster than Washington can answer them.


The conversation runs from Begich's 440 coins on Mt. Gox, to the American Reserve Modernization Act (ARMA), the ~93-year cycle of global reserve currencies, the "untethering" of money from scarcity, and why he believes AI's hardest problem is the "disintermediation of purpose" rather than unemployment. They close on UBI, Alaska's Permanent Fund as a model of citizen ownership, and what's next for the budget and healthcare.


Guest: Rep. Nick Begich (R-AK)

Host: David Zell, Bitcoin Policy Institute

Recorded at PubKey


CHAPTERS

0:00 Intro: A Founder Comes to Congress

1:21 From Baylor to Ford to Building a Software Company

5:17 Finding Bitcoin in 2013 & Surviving Mt. Gox

6:44 The Founder's Mindset vs. the Zero-Sum Worldview

13:56 ARMA: The Case for a Strategic Bitcoin Reserve

19:25 The "Untethering Event": Scarcity, Inflation & the Debt Spiral

25:58 AI's Promise, Peril & the "Disintermediation of Purpose"

31:59 Open-Source AI, China & Catastrophic Misuse Risk

39:14 Drawing the Regulatory Line & the "Bitcoin of AI"

42:25 UBI vs. Alaska's Permanent Fund: "Universal Basic Investment"

49:43 What's Next: The Budget, Healthcare & Quantum


#Bitcoin #BitcoinPolicy #ARMA #NickBegich #AIPolicy #DigitalAssets #StrategicBitcoinReserve #BPI #Crypto #MonetaryPolicy

]]>

item.title: The Peter McCormack Show – #193 - David Goodhart - AI Is Coming For The Graduate Elite
item.description:
David Goodhart joins me to discuss whether AI is about to do to the graduate class what globalisation did to factory workers, and why Britain’s political settlement may be breaking apart.


David explains why Britain has overproduced people with generalist academic skills, how the “anywheres” came to dominate politics, culture and the economy, and why the “somewheres” have increasingly turned to Brexit, populism, Reform and Restore as a reaction against a country they no longer feel represents them.


We also discuss whether anything has actually got better in Britain over the last 15 years, why the state seems unable to get things done, immigration, multiculturalism, deindustrialisation, care work, the collapse of trust in politicians, and why David still believes Britain has the ingredients to recover.


- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

item.title: Bitcoin Archive w Archie – If the Power Law Is right… $1m Bitcoin Is Coming | Smitty, Sminston_With
item.description:
Could Bitcoin's price be more predictable than most investors think?

Smitty, Swinston_with, explores the famous Bitcoin Power Law model, whether it can continue to hold, and what could eventually break it. Smitty explains why Bitcoin's long-term growth appears to follow the same mathematical patterns found throughout nature, while also challenging popular narratives around the four-year cycle, halvings, and adoption.

⚠️ Bitcoin's greatest strength may not be any single model, but understanding which models explain reality, and which ones simply fit the past.

item.title: The Pomp Podcast – Why No Company Will Win the AI War: The "Rebel Alliance" Thesis | Nick Grossman

Nick Grossman is a General Partner at Union Square Ventures. In this conversation, we break down his "Rebel Alliance" thesis for AI — why he believes the industry is too big for one or two companies to dominate. We also discuss USV's internal multi-agent platform, model routing economics, AI's growing role in venture capital and financial markets, data privacy risks, and what happens to jobs and society as agents get smarter.

item.title: bitcoin ist - Wissen statt FOMO – 19) ... Schutz vor Inflation
item.description:
Was genau ist eigentlich Inflation? Mit der Definition dieses wichtigen Begriffs fangen die Probleme schon an. Denn da prallen verschiedene Auslegungen aufeinander. Es ist unumstritten, dass durch Inflation die Preise ansteigen. Aber was sind die Ursachen?

In dieser Folge von „bitcoin ist...“

  • Wie die Zentralbanken sich mit der Umdeutung des Begriffs mehr Spielraum verschaffen. Denn wie die Inflation definiert wird bestimmt darüber, wie sie wahrgenommen wird. Die EZB nimmt sich dabei als "Täter" heraus und bezeichnet Inflation als "allgemeinen Anstieg des Preisniveaus", obwohl sie selbst die Geldmenge ausweitet!


  • Woher kommt Inflation? Natürlich ist die Ausweitung der Geldmenge nicht der einzige Grund für den Anstieg der Preise - aber dafür ein wesentlicher Treiber eines kontinuierlich hohem Inflationsniveaus.


  • Was bedeutet ein Anstieg der Inflation von 2 % auf 3 %? Es klingt nach wenig – so, als ob der Anstieg nur 1 % beträgt. Aber in Wirklichkeit steigen die Preise ab jetzt um 50 % schneller an (während die absoluten Preise natürlich nicht um 50 % springen).


Bitcoin kommt in dieser Folge wieder nur am Rand vor. Aber eines sollte klar sein: ein Gut, dass sich nicht inflationieren lässt, schützt deine Kaufkraft langfristig gut.

„ Inflation ist kein Zustand, sondern eine Beschleunigung der Entwertung. Die Inflationsrate beschreibt eine Geschwindigkeit, mit der die Preise über einen Zeitraum ansteigen. “


Alles von "bitcoin ist..." Hier geht es zu allen meinen Kanälen: https://linktr.ee/bitcoinist

Einsteiger-Spezial: möchtest du wissen, WIE man bitcoin sicher kauft und verwahrt? kostenlose und sichere Kaufanleitung direkt in dein Postfach https://tinyurl.com/45rpsjuc

Hinterlasse mir gerne eine 5-Sterne-Bewertung oder einen Kommentar.

Danke, Dein Christian.

]]>

item.title: THE Bitcoin Podcast – Bitcoin Bottom? Strategy Death Spiral? Fed Money Printer? | Joe Consorti
item.description:
Is the Bitcoin bottom in—or could another major selloff be coming?

Joe Consorti joins Walker to break down the macro forces driving Bitcoin, including the Iran conflict, the Strait of Hormuz, rising oil prices, inflation, Federal Reserve policy, and the prospect of an inflationary recession. Joe explains why an oil supply shock cannot be solved by higher interest rates, why the Fed may ultimately cut rather than hike, and how political pressure ahead of the midterms could shape markets.

They also examine Strategy’s controversial Bitcoin sales and dismantle claims that the company, MSTR, or its STRC preferred equity is caught in a “death spiral.” Joe explains Strategy’s debt structure, the risk of forced Bitcoin liquidation, its push for inclusion in the S&P 500, and how the company can sell BTC to fund dividends while remaining a net buyer over time.

Finally, Joe shares why monetary debasement sustains his long-term Bitcoin conviction—and how his Christian faith keeps him grounded amid political, economic, and geopolitical uncertainty.

item.title: The Bitcoin Way Podcast – Is The EU The New China? | Bitcoin Banter
item.description:
🔑 Learn how to take 100% self-custody of your Bitcoin: https://www.thebitcoinway.com/services/bitcoin-self-custody-training?utm_source=tbw&utm_medium=fountain&utm_campaign=bitcoin-banter&utm_content=desc

🛡️ Secure your digital life with personal cybersecurity: https://www.thebitcoinway.com/services/personal-cybersecurity?utm_source=tbw&utm_medium=fountain&utm_campaign=bitcoin-banter&utm_content=desc

📞 Schedule a FREE call: https://www.thebitcoinway.com/contact?utm_source=tbw&utm_medium=fountain&utm_campaign=bitcoin-banter&utm_content=desc

📖 Interested in a Plan B? Download our FREE Panama 🇵🇦 Residency Guide here: https://www.thebitcoinway.com/services/plan-b-residency-programs?utm_source=tbw&utm_medium=fountain&utm_campaign=bitcoin-banter&utm_content=video-desc

In this episode of Bitcoin Banter, Michael, Tony & Katie discuss how the European Union is pushing client-side scanning of private messages while actively censoring criticism of its surveillance agenda.

The team covers Chat Control 2.0, a proposal that would force devices to scan messages before encryption using AI. They expose how EU countries banned YouTube videos discussing this legislation, only to quietly reverse course after public backlash. The conversation shifts to Germany scrapping its Bitcoin-friendly tax policy, the UK government's failed attempt to restrict VPNs, and why official inflation numbers don't match what people experience at the grocery store.

Stick around for Donkey of the Week, where New South Wales introduces a bill that takes inflation to a whole new level.

⏱️ TIMESTAMPS:

00:00 - EU Chat Control & Censorship

08:10 - VPNs & Age Verification Bypass

10:10 - UK Government Backpedals on VPNs

14:27 - Germany Scraps Bitcoin Tax Exemption

19:21 - Inflation Reality vs Government Numbers

24:10 - Donkey of the Week

🎧 LISTEN TO OUR POD & OTHER EPISODES:

YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@TheBitcoinWay

Rumble: https://rumble.com/user/thebitcoinway

RSS: https://feeds.buzzsprout.com/2334006.rss

🎙 ABOUT OUR SHOW:

On Bitcoin Banter, Michael and members of The Bitcoin Way team discuss current events related to Bitcoin, macroeconomics, finance, politics, and more.

Follow Michael on: https://x.com/theothermjordan

Follow Tony on: https://x.com/V4BTC

Follow Katie on YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@bitcoinkatie

🔗 CONNECT WITH US:

item.title: Should I Invest in Bitcoin? Grow Your Wealth & Understand the Cryptocurrency Bit Coin, for Millennials Serious About Money and Investing – Ethereum Is Dead - Here Is the Proof and Why Bitcoin Is the Last Coin Standing (Bit Coin, Wealth & Investing)
item.description:
Are you still holding Ethereum because someone told you it was the future of crypto?

Ethereum is down 64% in dollars, down 65% against Bitcoin four years in a row, and its own network just destroyed 98% of its own revenue by accident. The people who told you to buy it have gone very quiet. This is the episode they don't want you to hear.

In this episode you will discover:

  • How Ethereum accidentally built its own killer and why the revenue collapse is a design flaw not a dip
  • Why Solana is fast technology built on inflationary sand, no fixed supply, down 70%, and a network that went offline five times
  • Why Bitcoin just accumulated $128 billion in institutional money while everything else lost ground and why alt season is not coming back

Listen now because if you own anything other than Bitcoin, this one is going to sting. Good. It's supposed to!

I built a free calculator that shows exactly what consistent monthly Bitcoin investing could do to your wealth over 5, 10 or 20 years. It's called the Steady Stack Calculator — punch in what you can afford to put in each month and see what the numbers actually look like at the other end. Most people are genuinely surprised. You can also download the 10 Bitcoin Mistakes to Avoid document completely free at the same link.

Steady Stack Calculator and 10 Bitcoin Mistakes Document — click here to grab both for free

Hit follow, so you never miss the latest insights on money, finance, invest and build wealth - plus clear guidance on cryptocurrency, Bitcoin, and Bit Coin for today’s serious investors.


]]>

item.title: Bitcoin News Alerts | Daily BTC Macro Signal – 2404: BlackRock Just Confirmed Bitcoin's Future - $10M Warning
item.description:
For years, a $10 million Bitcoin was dismissed as unrealistic. That conversation is changing quickly.

In today's episode, we examine why BlackRock's latest actions may represent one of the strongest institutional confirmations Bitcoin has ever received. From Larry Fink's bullish outlook to the rapid growth of BlackRock's Bitcoin ETF and the shrinking amount of Bitcoin still available for purchase, we explore why the next phase of Bitcoin adoption may be driven by competition for scarce supply rather than retail speculation.

📺 Prefer video? Watch daily Bitcoin breakdowns: http://BitcoinNewsAlerts.net

]]>

item.title: Der Relai Bitcoin Podcast – Der Bitcoin-Bärenmarkt zeigt bereits seine Zähne, mit Alex von Frankenberg | Relai Bitcoin Podcast #126
item.description:
Alex von Frankenberg ist seit Kurzem als Vollzeit-Bitcoiner aktiv und hat soeben sein Buch ins Englische übersetzt. In der Vergangenheit war er als VC-Investor aktiv, aber er hat sich entschieden, mehr in der Community aktiv zu werden.

Im Gespräch mit Relai-CEO Julian Liniger spricht Alex über den aktuellen Bitcoin-Bärenmarkt, wie er die Lage mit Bitcoin-Treasury-Firmen sieht, weshalb er sein Buch auf Englisch übersetzt hat und wohin die Reise in Zukunft geht.

Folge Alex auf X: https://x.com/Justdoitalex

Kaufe Alex’s Buch hier: https://www.amazon.de/-/en/Bitcoin-Geldentwertung-Technologie-Inflation-Finanzkrisen/dp/3949098593/

—

⏱ Kapitel:

00:00 - Intro und Vorstellung

01:40 - Wie schätzt Alex den Markt aktuell ein?

08:14 - Der Wettbewerb macht es schwer für Bitcoin

14:30 - Die Schere zwischen Arm und Reich wird immer grösser

17:01 - Wie schätzt Alex die Situation mit Strategy ein?

21:04 - Werbeunterbrechung für die Relai-App

23:40 - Warum gibt es eigentlich keine Gold-Reserve-Firmen?

29:10 - Ist langfristig in Bitcoin zu investieren immer noch das Beste?

37:18 - Wieso hat Alex sein Buch geschrieben und was ist die Kernbotschaft?

43:50 - Outro

—

Willst du dir die Sendung lieber anhören?

item.title: House of Satoshi - Bitcoin und Friends – #61 Sibylle Eberle: SRF-Sportmoderatorin und Bitcoinerin
item.description:
*** In eigener Sache: Wir lancieren ein eigenes Bitcoin-Finanzprodukt, gesteuert mit AI-Intelligenz. Das Prinzip: Bitcoin, wenn's läuft. Cash, wenn's kracht. Trag dich auf die Warteliste ein und erfahre als Erste oder Erster, wenn's losgeht. Zur Warteliste: https://btcai.house-of-satoshi.ch ***


Sybille Eberle ist Sportjournalistin bei SRF und gehört zum Moderationsteam von «Sport aktuell».


Zu Bitcoin kam sie über ihren Mann, der das Thema zuerst entdeckte. Heute hat sich das Bild gedreht: Wenn es um Bitcoin geht, hat sie zu Hause die Hosen an.


Richtig gepackt hat es sie, als sie auf der Suche nach gutem deutschsprachigem Content auf den Blocktrainer stiess, ihren persönlichen Dosenöffner ins Thema.


Darum geht's

  • Bitcoin ist für sie heute schon Geld und Bezahlmittel
  • Warum das heutige Geldsystem unfair ist, auch wenn sie selbst davon profitiert hat
  • Bitcoiner werden nicht weniger, im Gegenteil: es wächst, aus allen Schichten
  • Warum sie sich lange versteckt hat
  • Wie sie ihre Selbstverwahrung absichert und den Bitcoin-Nachlass geregelt hat
  • Ihre Podcast-Tipps, eigene Fehler und Tipps für alle, die einsteigen wollen


Weiterführende Links

Liana Wallet, die im Gespräch erwähnte Nachlass-Lösung: https://lianawallet.com/

Tipps zum Bitcoin-Nachlass: https://www.house-of-satoshi.ch/bitcoin-nachlass-schweiz/

]]>

item.title: Krypto Corner – Bitcoin, ETF und NFT: Sicher investieren - Krypto verstehen und sicher starten – Folge 6: Die Wahrheit über Altcoins & Pump and Dump | Podcast: Krypto Corner
item.description:
Bitcoin, Ethereum oder doch der Hunde-Coin aus dem Internet? 🐶 In der Krypto-Welt lauern überall Versuchungen. Tom stürmt in die Berliner WG, weil er auf TikTok gesehen hat, wie jemand über Nacht mit einem Spaß-Coin reich wurde. Erlebt er extremes FOMO (Fear of missing out)? Definitiv. Sollten wir Bitcoin also stoppen und lieber auf den schnellen Altcoin-Hype setzen?

In der 6. Episode der Krypto Corner nehmen wir uns die Zeit für einen echten Deep-Dive in die wilde Welt der Altcoins. Max erklärt unserer WG, warum es überhaupt noch über 20.000 andere Coins neben Bitcoin gibt. Wir lernen den genialen Unterschied kennen: Bitcoin als unzerstörbares "digitales Gold" und Ethereum als programmierbarer "Weltcomputer".

Wir klären, wie "Smart Contracts" funktionieren und das Potenzial haben, ganze Branchen (Banken, Versicherungen) auf den Kopf zu stellen (DeFi). Gleichzeitig decken wir aber schonungslos die dunkle Seite auf: Wie Influencer und Kriminelle mit Memecoins und "Pump and Dump"-Maschen reihenweise Anfänger abkassieren. Lerne in unter 15 Minuten, wie du echtes technologisches Potenzial von toxischem Glücksspiel unterscheidest!

📚 Das Buch zur Show: Hol dir das Buch zur Folge: „Krypto verstehen – sicher starten. Band 1“ von Sascha Swen Heiter. Wenn du das gesamte Wissen sofort anwenden möchtest – von der Einrichtung deiner Hardware Wallets über die Nutzung von Burner Wallets bis hin zu wichtigen rechtlichen und steuerlichen Themen in der DACH-Region – hol dir das komplette Buch! 👉 https://amzn.eu/d/06DuLLUw

🔗 FOLGE MIR FÜR MEHR KRYPTO-WISSEN: • Spotify:https://open.spotify.com/show/5MOMwCZpWNvm6J52jkdLcl?si=yq7YoMyZSnWCg_xrVLcnww • Apple Podcasts:https://podcasts.apple.com/de/podcast/krypto-corner-bitcoin-etf-und-nft-sicher-investieren/id1872914214 • Instagram:https://instagram.com/Swen_Heiter

👇 Unterstütze den Kanal: Wenn dir diese Folge geholfen hat, lass ein Abo da, gib dem Video einen Daumen nach oben und aktiviere die Glocke. Hinterlass mir einen Kommentar: Hast du in deinen Krypto-Anfängen auch mal Lehrgeld bei einem Shitcoin bezahlt, oder bist du direkt bei Bitcoin geblieben? 💬

⚖️ Rechtliche Hinweise / Haftungsausschluss: Die in diesem Podcast geteilten Inhalte dienen ausschließlich der allgemeinen Information sowie der Unterhaltung und stellen keine Anlage-, Rechts- oder Steuerberatung dar. Investitionen in Kryptowährungen sind hochriskant und können zu einem Totalverlust des eingesetzten Kapitals führen. Jeder Hörer und Zuschauer handelt absolut eigenverantwortlich. Besonders bei steuerlichen Themen ist zu beachten, dass die steuerliche Behandlung von Kryptowährungen sehr komplex ist. Bitte konsultiere für die aktuell geltende Rechtslage in der DACH-Region zwingend einen qualifizierten Steuerberater. Eine Haftung für Schäden, die aus der Nutzung der hier bereitgestellten Informationen entstehen, wird ausdrücklich ausgeschlossen.

#KryptoCorner #Altcoins #EthereumErklärt #SmartContracts #PumpAndDump #KryptoVerstehen #SaschaSwenHeiter #KryptoAnfänger #Podcast #Kapitel6


]]>

item.title: Münzcrime - True Crime Bitcoin Podcast – Unter Geldwäscheverdacht Episode 6 (mit Plep4Fun)
item.description:
Konto gesperrt. Komplett. Kein Überweisen, kein Abheben, kein gar nichts. Und das ohne Vorwarnung, ohne Erklärung, einfach so. 


Genau das hat Pleb4Fun im Januar 2025 erwischt. Von einer Sekunde auf die andere war er raus aus dem System – während Rechnungen weiterhin kamen und das Leben sich nicht um sein Bankproblem scherte. 
Was dann folgte, war kein schneller Anruf mit happy ending. Es war ein bürokratischer Alptraum, der eine viel unbequemere Frage aufwirft: Wie leicht gerät man heutzutage eigentlich ins Visier der Behörden, obwohl man absolut nichts falsch gemacht hat? 


Chefermittler Mavi hat sich mit Pleb4Fun zusammengesetzt und die ganze Geschichte auseinandergenommen – akribisch, ehrlich und ohne Schönfärberei. Raus gekommen ist dabei eine Episode, die unter die Haut geht. Nicht weil sie reißerisch ist, sondern weil es Realität ist.


Geldwäscheverdacht. Ein Begriff, den die meisten Menschen mit Kriminellen verbinden. Nicht mit jemandem, der einfach seinen Alltag lebt. 
Das hier ist keine abstrakte Diskussion über Finanzgesetze. Das ist die Geschichte eines Menschen, der plötzlich beweisen musste, dass er kein Verbrecher ist – und das Protokoll dazu liegt jetzt auf dem Tisch. 

Links zur Folge:
Pleb4Fun Dokumentation auf X

Ticketverkauf Event Brivat (Bitcoin Privacy Event)

Der Fall Samourai

V4V:
crime21@getalby.com

Nostr:
npub14cz50cvahflq8kpe57qxnnvgmveyng6l8fdtessdqm8ht9fcly3qjd20ry

X:
https://x.com/Muenzcrime

E-Mail:
muenzcrime@tuta.io]]>

item.title: Bitcoin Rails | Isabel Foxen Duke – Zero-Knowledge Proofs For Post-Quantum Bitcoin | BENEDIKT BÜNZ
item.description:
While many Bitcoiners remain hopeful the network will embrace zero-knowledge proofs for protocol-level use cases, practical adoption has remained limited outside of BitVM and a handful of experimental proposals.

Most of the world’s ZKP research has circled around Ethereum and other ecosystems, where significant resources have been dedicated to advancing these systems, particularly for scaling and privacy applications.

One of the most notable contributors to this research is Benedikt Bünz — professor of cryptography at NYU and collaborator of Dan Boneh, who together inarguably form one of the strongest blockchain-applied cryptography teams in the world.

The pair recently announced they’ll be leading the new post-quantum cryptography unit localhost research — the first dedicated PQ research effort within a major Bitcoin development organization.

With Benedikt leading the charge on the use of zero-knowledge proofs for post-quantum mitigation, the question emerges: will the post-quantum transition be the catalyst to finally bring zero-knowledge proofs to Bitcoin's core protocol?

In more details, Benedikt and I discuss:

  • Why ZKPs haven’t been widely adopted by the Bitcoin technical community — and why the threat of quantum computers may change that posture going forward
  • How ZKPs could be used for signature batching to address larger post-quantum signatures in Bitcoin’s post-quantum era
  • Why Bitcoiners will likely prioritize hash-based signatures as an initial post-quantum scheme — rather than more efficient but less proven alternatives (e.g. lattice-based)
  • How ZKPs have evolved over the last decade and may finally be ready for Bitcoin’s strict requirements around trust assumptions
  • Why Benedikt and Dan are teaming up with localhost research to create the first post-quantum cryptography unit within a major Bitcoin development organization + what they hope to accomplish

This episode of Bitcoin Rails is brought to you by:

LayerTwo Labs — developing research, software, and technologies for scaling Bitcoin via the integration of Drivechains (BIP 300/301)

Hashi on Sui Network — a primitive for executing Bitcoin DeFi transactions, without having to trust a federated bridge or other centralized entity

BitBox — an open-source Bitcoin-only hardware wallet, with smooth UX and no compromises on security. Check out Bitbox [dot] swiss and use code BITCOINRAILS to get a discount

]]>

item.title: Bitcoin Audible – Chat_174 - Preparing Bitcoin for an Unknown Future with Hunter Beast
item.description:
***"I'm almost 99% certain that [BIP] 110 will activate. And not only that, I think there will be a capitulation after October, where if the month of October passes and [BIP] 110 is still not merged by Core devs, it essentially reflects that they are no longer relevant because they failed to be good stewards of the protocol."

~ Hunter Beast***

In this episode I sit down with Hunter Beast for a sprawling, high-signal exploration of how to prepare Bitcoin for an unknowable future. We cover formal verification and Lean 4, AI-accelerated proofs, surveillance and BIP39 risks, faith and natural law, and why he thinks governance must shift toward provable safety over new features. We finish with his confident prediction that BIP 110 will activate, and what it would mean for Core’s relevance if it doesn’t.

Chapters

(00:00:00) - Intro and Hunter's prediction

(00:06:33) - Researching critical vulnerabilities

(00:19:40) - Hilbert's questions and the limits of mathematics

(00:28:46) - Faith, personal struggles, and identity

(00:37:32) - BIP39 and surveillance

(00:43:28) - AI, false idols, and religious history

(00:49:26) - Natural law and nation states

(00:56:43) - Nodes, and decentralized storage markets

(01:24:56) - BIP 110, crisis and shift

(02:09:52) - Predictions around BIP 110 activation

(02:12:10) - Defending Bitcoin against economic populism

Guest Links

Hunter on X (Link: https://twitter.com/cryptoquick)

Hunter's Website (Link: https://cryptoquick.com/)

Hunter's GitHub (Link: https://github.com/cryptoquick)

item.title: BITCOIN & ALTCOINS – Bodenbildung abgeschlossen?
item.description:
Die Stimmung am Kryptomarkt verbessert sich: Bitcoin und Altcoins zeigen Erholungstendenzen, doch der große Befreiungsschlag steht noch aus. Gelingt der nächste Ausbruch über wichtige Widerstände? Welche Signale liefern der US-Markt und die aktuellen Konjunkturdaten – und wann könnten sich daraus neue Chancen zum Nachkaufen ergeben?

Antworten gibt Oliver Michel (tokentus Investment AG) in der neuen Folge von "BITCOIN & ALTCOINS" im Interview.

Hinweis: Die im Podcast besprochenen Coins und Token stellen keine spezifischen Kauf- oder Anlageempfehlungen dar. Die Moderatoren oder der Verlag haften nicht für etwaige Verluste, die aufgrund der Umsetzung der im Podcast diskutierten Gedanken oder Ideen entstehen.

Das Gespräch wurde am 21.07.2026 an der Frankfurter Börse aufgezeichnet.

]]>

item.title: Coin Stories with Natalie Brunell – News Block: CLARITY Act Faces Critical Test, Saylor Shares 110 Reasons Why BIP-110 Is a Bad Idea, Lyn Alden & Jeff Booth Launch $40M Bitcoin Company
item.description:
In this week's episode of the Coin Stories News Block powered exclusively by Ledn, we cover these major headlines related to Bitcoin, macroeconomics, and global finance:

  • The CLARITY Act faces its make-or-break moment, but odds of passage have collapsed to 32%
  • Saylor publishes 110 reasons why BIP-110 is a bad idea for Bitcoin
  • Lyn Alden says the proposal won't actually stop spam — and there are bigger threats to worry about
  • Jeff Booth and Lyn Alden launch Orange Juice, a $40M Bitcoin treasury company backed by Ricardo Salinas
  • Tether freezes $131M in stablecoins tied to Iran's central bank — a reminder of why Bitcoin is different

----

Ledn has a perfect track record protecting over $11 billion in client value through every market cycle since 2018. And Tether Gold is now live on Ledn, giving you two of the most verifiably scarce, non-sovereign assets ever created, held side by side. Hard assets. Real flexibility. One platform. In this week's episode of the Coin Stories News Block powered exclusively by Ledn, we cover these major headlines related to Bitcoin, macroeconomics, and global finance:

  • The CLARITY Act faces its make-or-break moment, but odds of passage have collapsed to 32%
  • Saylor publishes 110 reasons why BIP-110 is a bad idea for Bitcoin
  • Lyn Alden says the proposal won't actually stop spam — and there are bigger threats to worry about
  • Jeff Booth and Lyn Alden launch Orange Juice, a $40M Bitcoin treasury company backed by Ricardo Salinas

item.title: Bitcoin Bundesverband Podcast – #2 Vorstandsvorstellung
item.description:
Am 26. September 2024 wurde der ⁠Bitcoin Bundesverband⁠ offiziell gegründet, und der erste Vorstand wurde gewählt. Zum Vorstandsvorsitzenden wurde Philipp Hartmannsgruber ernannt, sein Stellvertreter ist Daniel Wingen, und Matthias Steger übernimmt das Amt des Finanzvorstands. Weitere Vorstandsmitglieder sind Evelyn Brock, Jens Leinert, Dr. Mathias Linkerhand und Lars Eichhorst. In dieser Folge stellt sich das Team vor.


Bitcoin Bundesverband (BTCBV)

Website⁠ | ⁠Telegram⁠ | ⁠X⁠ | ⁠LinkedIn⁠ | ⁠Nostr⁠

]]>

item.title: Bitcoin And | Bitcoin & Economic News – 24/7 Casino | Bitcoin News
item.description:
Bitcoin news and bitcoin regulation update. Today I cover Jack Mallers stepping down as CEO of Twenty One Capital, rising Polymarket odds for the Clarity Act, the cost of operating under Europe’s MiCA rules, and Russia’s new state-regulated framework for crypto and foreign trade. I also look at the London Stock Exchange’s overnight trading plans, Galaxy’s $5 million Bitcoin quantum-readiness initiative, and an open-source global intelligence dashboard.

Topics for today:
  • Jack Mallers Steps Down From Twenty One
  • Clarity Act Odds Rise
  • MiCA Compliance Costs Mount
  • World Monitor Tracks Global Risk
  • London Stock Exchange Adds Overnight Trading
  • Galaxy Funds Bitcoin Quantum Security
  • Russia Regulates Crypto Foreign Trade

item.title: All In Bitcoin – 034 Matt Corallo: Bitcoin Has One Shot at the AI Economy - Here's How to Win I All in Bitcoin w/CK
item.description:
AI agents are about to start using money.

Will they use Visa, stablecoins… or Bitcoin?

Bitcoin developer Matt Corallo explains why AI could become Bitcoin’s biggest opportunity—or its biggest threat. From Lightning wallets and agentic payments to open-source AI, quantum computing, mining decentralization, and the future of money, this conversation explores what happens when machines become economic actors.

Bitcoin #AIAgents #Lightning #BitcoinDevelopment #MattCorallo #AIPayments

item.title: Bitcoin Insights | Bitcoin Podcast mit Philipp 'PJAH' Hartmannsgruber – #16 Im Auto nach El Zonte: Bitcoin in El Salvador mit Robin Seyr und Ben Raich
item.description:
In dieser Episode spricht Philipp mit Robin Seyr und Ben Raich im Auto auf dem Weg von San Salvador nach El Zonte über ihre Eindrücke aus El Salvador. Sie diskutieren die Bitcoin-Adoption, die Adopting Bitcoin-Konferenz, die Sicherheitslage, die alltägliche Nutzung von Bitcoin und die politische Situation unter Präsident Bukele.


Wer ist Robin Seyr?

Robin Seyr ist Host vom täglichen Bitcoin Podcast.


Wer ist Ben Raich?

Ben Raich arbeitet mit Leidenschaft an vielfältigen Projekten im Bitcoin-Space, um Bildung und Adaption von Bitcoin voranzutreiben. Sein Schwerpunkt liegt auf der Produktion hochwertiger Videopodcasts, dem Videoschnitt sowie journalistischen Tätigkeiten.

In dieser Episode spricht Philipp mit Robin Seyr und Ben Raich im Auto auf dem Weg von San Salvador nach El Zonte über ihre Eindrücke aus El Salvador. Sie diskutieren die Bitcoin-Adoption, die Adopting Bitcoin-Konferenz, die Sicherheitslage, die alltägliche Nutzung von Bitcoin und die politische Situation unter Präsident Bukele.


Wer ist Robin Seyr?

Robin Seyr ist Host vom täglichen Bitcoin Podcast.


Wer ist Ben Raich?

Ben Raich arbeitet mit Leidenschaft an vielfältigen Projekten im Bitcoin-Space, um Bildung und Adaption von Bitcoin voranzutreiben. Sein Schwerpunkt liegt auf der Produktion hochwertiger Videopodcasts, dem Videoschnitt sowie journalistischen Tätigkeiten.

item.title: Epicenter - Learn about Crypto, Blockchain, Ethereum, Bitcoin and Distributed Technologies – Vitalik Buterin on The Economic Zone (EEZ) Ep. 642
item.description:
In this special episode, we revisit a fireside conversation between Vitalik Buterin and Friederike Ernst at DappCon 2026 in Berlin. They explore the Ethereum Economic Zone (EEZ), a new vision for Ethereum built around synchronous composability, app chains, and real-time proving.


Following the fireside, Sebastien and Friederike break down the ideas behind the EEZ and discuss what this new paradigm could mean for Ethereum's future.


Topics covered include:

• The Ethereum Economic Zone and synchronous composability

• App chains, privacy networks, and prediction markets

• Ethereum as an economic operating system for the internet

• Sequencing, MEV, and shared liquidity across chains

• Enterprise, government, and institutional use cases

• Why this approach differs from Cosmos, Polkadot, and other ecosystem visions

• The future of Ethereum beyond rollup fragmentation


Links:

Lido: https://lido.fi/stvaults?mtm_campaign=epicenter


Sponsors:

Lido V3 introduces stVaults: a modular staking infrastructure that lets builders and institutions deploy custom staking vaults, while staying anchored to stETH as a shared liquidity layer.


Get started building with Lido V3 today: https://lido.fi/stvaults?mtm_campaign=epicenter

Block Space Forum: https://blockspace.forum/


NEAR AI Cloud now lets developers deploy OpenClaw—the rapidly growing open-source AI agent platform—inside Trusted Execution Environments, providing hardware-level encryption with cryptographic attestations. With OpenClaw on NEAR AI Cloud, you can run agents with cloud convenience, but without traditional cloud data exposure. No hardware to manage. No trust assumptions required. Learn more at near.ai.

]]>

item.title: Bitcoin Audible – Chat_174 - Preparing Bitcoin for an Unknown Future with Hunter Beast
item.description:
***"I'm almost 99% certain that [BIP] 110 will activate. And not only that, I think there will be a capitulation after October, where if the month of October passes and [BIP] 110 is still not merged by Core devs, it essentially reflects that they are no longer relevant because they failed to be good stewards of the protocol."

~ Hunter Beast***

In this episode I sit down with Hunter Beast for a sprawling, high-signal exploration of how to prepare Bitcoin for an unknowable future. We cover formal verification and Lean 4, AI-accelerated proofs, surveillance and BIP39 risks, faith and natural law, and why he thinks governance must shift toward provable safety over new features. We finish with his confident prediction that BIP 110 will activate, and what it would mean for Core’s relevance if it doesn’t.

Chapters

(00:00:00) - Intro and Hunter's prediction

(00:06:33) - Researching critical vulnerabilities

(00:19:40) - Hilbert's questions and the limits of mathematics

(00:28:46) - Faith, personal struggles, and identity

(00:37:32) - BIP39 and surveillance

(00:43:28) - AI, false idols, and religious history

(00:49:26) - Natural law and nation states

(00:56:43) - Nodes, and decentralized storage markets

(01:24:56) - BIP 110, crisis and shift

(02:09:52) - Predictions around BIP 110 activation

(02:12:10) - Defending Bitcoin against economic populism

Guest Links

Hunter on X (Link: https://twitter.com/cryptoquick)

Hunter's Website (Link: https://cryptoquick.com/)

Hunter's GitHub (Link: https://github.com/cryptoquick)

Affiliate Links

  • Become sovereign, hold your keys, be censorship resistant with the Bitbox hardware wallet. Get 5% off everything in the store with code GUY (Link: https://bitbox.swiss/)
  • Get 10% off the best Bitcoin board game in the world, HODLUP! Or any of the other great games from The Free Market Kids! Use code GUY10 at checkout for 10% off your cart! (Link: https://www.freemarketkids.com/collections/games-1)

Host Links

⁠⁠Guy on Nostr ⁠(Link: http://tinyurl.com/2xc96ney)

⁠Guy on X ⁠(Link: https://twitter.com/theguyswann)

Guy on Instagram (Link: https://www.instagram.com/theguyswann)

item.title: BitcoinBázis - Minden, Ami Kriptó – Hogyan Legyél Anonim az Interneten?
item.description:
🕵️‍♂️ Lehetetlen eltűnni az internetről? Vagy mégis van esélyed?


A legtöbben azt hiszik, hogy a VPN vagy a sütik elutasítása már elég az anonimitáshoz. A valóság viszont ennél sokkal nyersebb. 👁️


Ebben a videóban Lőrincz Barbi mesél arról, hogyan működik a digitális megfigyelés, milyen adatokat gyűjtenek rólunk nap mint nap, és hogy egyáltalán lehetséges-e követhetetlenné válni az interneten.


Szó lesz többek között:

🔹 hogyan működik az online követés

🔹 miért nem elég egy VPN

🔹 az eldobható telefonok előnyeiről és buktatóiról

🔹 a VPN-szolgáltatók kevésbé ismert titkairól

🔹 sütikről és online adatgyűjtésről 🍪

🔹 állami megfigyelésről és kamerarendszerekről 📹

🔹 hogyan azonosíthatnak akár a billentyűleütéseid sebessége alapján is ⌨️

🔹 böngészőkről, keresésekről és az adatvédelmi lehetőségeidről.

Ha fontos számodra a magánszféra, érdekel a digitális szabadság vagy egyszerűen szeretnéd jobban érteni, hogyan működik az online világ a háttérben, ezt a beszélgetést érdemes végignézned. ⚡


⏱️ Időbélyegek:

00:00 - 00:18 Intro

00:19 - 01:39 Telefon vásárlás maximális anonimitással

01:40 - 02:31 Az eszköz használatánál mire figyelj?

02:32 - 03:02 KYC azonosítás, SIM-kártya

03:03 - 03:42 GPS lekövetés, Bluetooth használat

03:43 - 04:34 Az eszköz követése

04:35 - 05:41 VPN használat

05:42 - 06:50 Keresési szokások, mintázatok beazonosítása

06:51 - 07:41 Outro


💬 Te mennyire figyelsz az online adatvédelemre?

Írd meg kommentben – kíváncsiak vagyunk a véleményedre!


👍 Ha tetszett a videó, nyomj egy lájkot és iratkozz fel a csatornára!


#AdatVédelem #Anonimitás #VPN #Cybersecurity #KiberBiztonság #Privacy #Internet #Megfigyelés #Digitálisujjlenyomat #Sütik #Technológia #LőrinczBarbi


🌐Honlap: https://www.bitcoinbazis.hu/

🎙️Podcast: https://open.spotify.com/show/03pqXbQ5FTaeOtxtyu7s74

👍Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/bitcoinbazis/

🛍️ Shop: https://shop.bitcoinbazis.hu

📷Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/bitcoinbazis.hu/

🗂️LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/bitcoin-bázis

📱Telegram: https://t.me/bitconbazishirek

✨TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@bitcoinbazis.hu

🐦X(Twitter): https://twitter.com/bitcoinbazis

⚡Fountain FM: https://fountain.fm/show/9Wcx4MEFdNrbMOZo7C8q

💬Discord: https://discord.gg/DnSxreYG3F

🟡 Binance Ha még nincs Binance fiókod, regisztrálj a linkünkkel és 20% kedvezményben részesülsz a kereskedéseid után: https://www.binance.com/hu/buy-sell-crypto/?ref=11035096

item.title: Store of Bitcoin - Bitcoin as Store of Value – Ep. 49 - Daniel Batten | A new different wave of Bitcoin Adopters.
item.description:
In this episode of Store of Bitcoin, host Alessandro Ottaviani welcomes Daniel Batten, a prominent Bitcoin analyst and investor, to discuss the evolving narrative surrounding Bitcoin, particularly in relation to energy consumption and environmental impact. Daniel shares insights on how the mainstream media's perception of Bitcoin has shifted from skepticism to a more favorable view, largely due to rigorous research and advocacy from the Bitcoin community. He emphasizes the importance of effectively communicating Bitcoin's benefits to various stakeholders, including policymakers and investors, to foster broader adoption.

The conversation delves into the challenges of reaching new adopters, particularly those who may not be motivated by the same values that initially attracted early Bitcoin enthusiasts. Daniel highlights the need for a more nuanced approach to education and outreach, focusing on the social and environmental benefits of Bitcoin. He also discusses the potential for Bitcoin to serve as a tool for financial inclusion in developing countries, where it can provide a safeguard against inflation and empower individuals in oppressive regimes. The episode concludes with a look at future trends in Bitcoin adoption and the importance of aligning messaging with the values of diverse audiences.

This episode is sponsored by ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠BitVault⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠, the new open-source & self-custody wallet utilizing time-delays and multisignature to offset physical attacks and hacks.

item.title: The Bitcoin Treasury Podcast – BlackRock Built A Bitcoin Wrapper That Beats Saylor's Yield — And Gives You BTC Upside
item.description:
Robbie Mitchnick is Managing Director and Global Head of Digital Assets at BlackRock — the world's largest asset manager. He led the launch of IBIT, the most successful ETF in Wall Street history. Now BlackRock has launched BITA, a covered call Bitcoin product targeting high teens yield while retaining 70% of Bitcoin's upside.

Bitcoin Treasuries President and The Bitcoin Historian Pete Rizzo joins Tyler Rowe for the full conversation. They cover the IBIT inflow and outflow data, the hodler thesis ($48B of IBIT's $50B drop was Bitcoin's price, not outflows), why Bitcoin's narrative was badly mismanaged, the machine native money thesis, the debt and deficit catalyst, and why BlackRock now says the question isn't whether Bitcoin is too risky — it's whether it's risky not to hold any.

Follow Robbie: https://twitter.com/@RMitchnick Follow Pete: https://twitter.com/@pete_rizzo_

🎟️ Bitcoin Treasuries Conference — September 28, New York City Save 10% on tickets: https://bit.ly/4f1kGV5

 

CHAPTERS:
00:00 Cold Open
01:48 IBIT 2.5 Years In - Smashing ETF Records
07:15 IBIT Investors Are Hardcore HODLers
08:41 Bitcoin Portfolio Guidance
12:42 Demand For Institutional BTC Exposure
14:01 Bitcoin Yield & Investor Profiles
16:05 Bitcoin ETFs vs Strategy or Strive
17:37 Demand For Derivatives & Volatility
20:54 Onshoring BTC Options Market
22:22 BITA vs STRC, SATA & Digital Credit
23:14 What Robbie Thinks About Saylor's Strategy
24:43 How Larry Fink Evolved On Bitcoin
27:28 BTC Narrative Problems & Debt, Deficit & AI
37:03 BTC Infrastructure Maturity
39:10 BlackRock's Roadmap & Restraint
41:33 Tokenization & The Broader Ecosystem
44:05 When Does Crypto Cross The Chasm?
45:26 Is It Risky To NOT Hold Bitcoin?
47:37 Robbie's Message To The Institutional Skeptics
48:38 Stay Orange

 

🏛️ Institutional custody & OTC at bit.ly/bitGo

🔒 Secure your Bitcoin with COLDCARD — use code 6BT for 6% off at bit.ly/coinkiteStore

🏦 Borrow against your BTC from 8.49% at bit.ly/archlending

💼 Bitcoin executive recruitment at bit.ly/XCEio

⚡️ Bitcoin yield without leaving custody at bit.ly/hemiXYZ

 

📊 Track every Bitcoin treasury company at bitcointreasuries.net

⚠️ Not financial advice. Do your own research.

🟠 Stay Orange.

]]>

item.title: Relai Bitcoin Podcast – The Current State of the Bitcoin Community, With Robin Seyr | Relai Bitcoin Podcast #127
item.description:
Robin Seyr is the host of the Robin Seyr show and one of the hardest-working Bitcoin creators in the space. He is on the brink of reaching 900 episodes on this podcast and will eventually even hit 1,000 episodes later this year.

In this conversation with Relai CEO Julian Liniger, Robin talks about his podcast growth, why he decided to double down on English content as a German native speaker. Where he sees the community is heading and what all the fuss is about with Strategy.

You can follow Robin on X: https://x.com/RobinSeyr

—

⏱ Timestamps:

00:00 - Intro

02:53 - Why Robin built in English instead of German

11:47 - Entrepreneurial journey and first monetization

16:53 - Meeting Michael Saylor and setting up the main topic

19:32 - Robin's view on Strategy, Bitcoin, and the treasury model

33:38 - Is Strategy in trouble, or following the plan?

35:59 - Common equity Bitcoin exposure and why Robin isn't worried

43:27 - Bitcoin in self-custody vs. Strategy vs. Stretch

45:10 - Closing thoughts on scale and Bitcoin's role

48:55 - Outro

—

Prefer to enjoy this show in audio format?

🎧Listen on Apple Podcast: https://podcasts.apple.com/at/podcast/relai-bitcoin-podcast/id1543267066

🎧Listen on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/06BdZid57RlCgBNsgr703A?si=5ec60cc680534b44

--

The opinions expressed on the show are the opinions of the individual guests and may not reflect the opinions of Relai. The information on the podcast may be changed without notice, and is not guaranteed to be correct, complete or up-to-date.

--

item.title: The Bitcoin Boomers – The Fed's New Chairman Is Lying To You
item.description:
The new Fed Chairman says inflation will be a thing of the past.

Larry Lepard, Bob Burnett, and George Bodine explain why that's the most sophisticated lie in finance, and why the three assets the government can't print are about to come back with a vengeance.

Recorded July 14, 2026, as Kevin Warsh delivered his Humphrey-Hawkins testimony live.

In this episode: the Warsh playbook and "foaming the runway," why the Phillips curve is dead at the Fed, the Big Mac Index vs CPI, M2 growth vs the official inflation numbers, the AI capex arms race and why it guarantees liquidity, Hank Paulson's warning about the bond market, Japan's carry trade cracking, the power law model and why this drawdown looks like fall 2022, the Amazon parallel, and why you're not too late.

⏱ CHAPTERS

0:00 Cold Open: The Lie

1:07 Welcome: Warsh Testifies Live

1:37 "A Whopper of a Lie" + The Convenient CPI Print

2:45 The Warsh Playbook: Foaming the Runway

5:30 Why Bitcoin, Gold, and Silver Are in a Funk

7:01 Liquidity Is Tight: The China Factor

7:33 When Does It End? The Three Assets They Can't Print

8:19 Cooking the Numbers

9:07 Will AI Bail Them Out?

10:48 The Pivot: "Bitcoin Is Gonna Rip"

11:41 The Don Draper of Fed Chairmen

13:28 M2 vs CPI: The 4% Lie

14:13 Destroy Their System: Opt Out with Bitcoin

17:41 The Balance Sheet Trap

18:47 Paulson's Warning + Japan Is Cracking

20:58 The AI Capex Arms Race

24:59 Exponential Functions Burn Out

25:26 The Greatest Accumulation Period Since 2022

27:18 Dry Powder + The Power Law

28:40 For Everyone Who Bought at 120

31:28 "You're Not Too Late"

32:05 The Amazon Parallel: Buy the Leader

The Bitcoin Boomers is a panel for smart, successful people over 40 still on the outside of Bitcoin looking in. Plain English answers to the questions no one else will touch. Signal without the noise.

Your hosts:

Gary Leland, founder of BitBlockBoom and Hall of Fame podcaster.

Lawrence Lepard, sound money fund manager and author of The Big Print.

Bob Burnett, mining entrepreneur and founder of Barefoot Mining.

George Bodine, the World's Most Interesting Bitcoiner.

Listen to the audio anywhere:

🍎 Apple: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/the-bitcoin-boomers/id1853058330

⚡ Fountain: https://fountain.fm/show/kHBRZl0Mb0MGWMELtjw4

Subscribe: https://www.youtube.com/@BTCBoomers

Sponsors who make Boomers possible:

Sazmining, mine your own Bitcoin: https://Sazmining.com/Boomers

Ledn, borrow against your Bitcoin: https://ledn.io/boomers

Follow the hosts:

Bob Burnett https://x.com/boomer_btc

Gary Leland https://x.com/GaryLeland

Lawrence Lepard https://x.com/LawrenceLepard

George Bodine https://x.com/Jethroe111

Bitcoin #BitcoinForBeginners #BitcoinBoomers

Educational only. Not financial, legal, tax, or investment advice. Do your own research.

]]>

item.title: Raoul Pal: The Journey Man – The AI Revolution: How to Invest
item.description:
Raoul explores how AI, robotics, and blockchain could drive an economic singularity and radically reshape work, growth, and investing by 2030. He argues that the best response is to embrace the disruption, use AI, and invest in the long-term technologies transforming the global economy. Recorded July 9, 2026.

item.title: Bitcoin.com News Interviews – Real Finance CEO on RWAs, Tokenization & the Future of Onchain Finance
item.description:
Real-world asset (RWA) tokenization is still in its early stages—and according to Real Finance CEO and co-founder Ivo Grigorov, tokenized Treasuries are only the beginning.

In this conversation, Alex Richardson speaks with Ivo about building an EVM-compatible Layer 1 purpose-built for RWAs, the infrastructure needed for institutional adoption, and why custody, insurance, validator design, and standardized frameworks will be key to bringing traditional finance on-chain.


They discuss:

- Why tokenized Treasuries may become just one part of the long-term RWA market- Bringing revenue-generating assets on-chain

- The role of the ASSET token within the Real Finance ecosystem- Institutional partnerships and adoption strategies

- Euro stablecoins and the Real Finance mainnet roadmap

- Why Ethereum compatibility matters for institutional financeIf you're interested in tokenization, RWAs, stablecoins, institutional crypto adoption, and the future of onchain finance, this episode is for you.


🎧 Listen now and follow Bitcoin.com News on Spotify for more interviews with the founders, builders, and industry leaders shaping the future of crypto and digital finance.


Chapters:

(00:00) Introduction to Real Finance and Its Vision

(02:51) Tokenization of Real-World Assets

(06:11) Partnerships and Collaborations

(08:58) The Role of the Asset Token

(12:12) Exploring the EuroPeg Stablecoin

(15:12) Technological Foundations and EVM Compatibility

(18:07) Future of Tokenization and Market Opportunities

(20:56) Building a Strong Ecosystem through Partnerships

(23:50) Looking Ahead: What's Next for Real Finance

]]>
